recognized_artifact: workflow routing engine / decision path routing logic

entry_conditions.value: State is 'start' and 'issue present' condition is true.

exit_conditions.value: Transition to state 'end' via 'continuation not justified' condition from 'reassess_paths' state.
Transition to state 'end' via 'closure' condition from 'selected_terminal' state.

optional_steps.ambiguity: Conditional step executed only if the routing threshold is not met.
Conditional step executed only when exactly one destination path is selected.

loops.value: Loop from reassess_paths -> repeat_cycle -> expand_paths when threshold not met.
loops.source_text:
reassess_paths | threshold not met | repeat_cycle
repeat_cycle | continuation | expand_paths

branches.value: Branching from expand_paths based on path conditions (path_a listed, path_b listed, path_c listed).
branches.source_text:
expand_paths | path_a listed | gather_input
expand_paths | path_b listed | gather_input
expand_paths | path_c listed | gather_input
branches.ambiguity: It is unclear whether path_a, path_b, and path_c are evaluated concurrently, or sequentially, or if they represent exclusive branches, since they all lead to the same next state ('gather_input').

branches.value: Branching from reassess_paths based on outcome criteria (threshold not met, one path selected, continuation not justified).
branches.source_text:
reassess_paths | threshold not met | repeat_cycle
reassess_paths | one path selected | selected_terminal
reassess_paths | continuation not justified | end
branches.ambiguity: Conditions are assumed to be mutually exclusive but the table does not state evaluation priority if multiple conditions are true.

structural_layer.control_flow_shape: Cyclic state machine with a 3-way conditional divergence node at reassess_paths and multi-conditional convergence at gather_input.

preconditions.value: An 'issue present' condition must trigger the initial transition out of 'start'.

stopping_criteria.value: Condition 'continuation not justified' met at state 'reassess_paths'.

representation_layer.natural_language_summary: The procedure maps out a dynamic exploration and selection cycle. Starting from an issue detection, it branches out to list up to three paths (path_a, path_b, path_c). It then gathers new differentiating input before executing a reassessment. Depending on the threshold evaluation, the routine will either loop back via repeat_cycle to re-expand options, terminate due to a lack of justification, or isolate a single chosen terminal track to close out the task safely.
representation_layer.canonical_summary: An iterative state-machine topology tracking sequential path-expansion and input aggregation, executing conditional exit or loop routing based on differentiation thresholds.

ambiguities.description: Evaluation modality of listed paths (path_a, path_b, path_c).
plausible_interpretations: The system evaluates path listings concurrently and merges data flows in gather_input.
The system evaluates paths strictly sequentially or dynamically selects one distinct valid path attribute.
ambiguities.effect_on_extraction: Affects execution-sequence linearity modeling within structural_layer representation.

recognition_analysis.recognition_basis: The state designations 'expand_paths', 'gather_input', 'reassess_paths', 'selected_terminal' strongly correlate with specialized routing methodologies found in modern instruction framework execution and pathway arbitration trees.
recognition_analysis.prior_knowledge_leakage_risk: Low. Extraction parameters are bound directly to the explicit explicit literal keys provided in the variant transition block table text.
